content.cn_text: [旁白]: 你
content.en_text: [Narrator]: You

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

content.cn_text: [朱莉]: 你好，请问我能和约翰·格特尔斯通先生通话吗？ [约翰]: 我就是。 [朱莉]: 哦，你好。我叫朱莉·布鲁姆。我来英国留学一年，一个朋友告诉我你组织了一个国际俱乐部，不同国籍的人可以在那里见面。
content.en_text: [Julie]: Hello, could I speak to Mr. John Gertelstone, please [John]: speaking. [Julie]: Oh, hi. My name is Julie Bloom. I'm studying here in the UK for a year and a friend told me you organize an international club where people of different nationalities can meet up.

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 没错。俱乐部成立于50多年前，目前我们有来自大约30个国家的成员。
content.en_text: [John]: That's right. The club was founded over 50 years ago and at present we've got members from approximately 30 countries.

content.cn_text: 你朋友叫什么名字？ [朱莉]: 露易丝。她现在回美国了。 [约翰]: 哦，露易丝。我记得她。朱莉，你也是美国人吗？ [朱莉]: 是的，来自加利福尼亚。 [约翰]: 太好了。嗯，我来告诉你一些关于俱乐部的事情。成为会员费用不高。你可以加入两个月，费用是2英镑50便士，或者加入12个月，费用是8英镑50便士。 [朱莉]: 只有大学生才能参加吗？
content.en_text: What's the name of your friend? [Julie]: Louise. She's back in the States now. [John]: Oh Louise. I remember her. So are you from the States, too, Julie? [Julie]: Yes, from California. [John]: Great. Well, let's see what I can tell you about the club. It doesn't cost a lot to become a member. You can join for two months for two pounds 50 or it's eight pounds 50 for 12 months. [Julie]: And is it only for university students?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 不，我们对所有人开放。我们有很多来自城里语言学校的会员，也有对结识外国朋友感兴趣的当地人。
content.en_text: [John]: No, we're open to anyone. We have quite a few members from the language schools in town and also local people who are interested in meeting people from other countries.

content.cn_text: [朱莉]: 好的。那你们都做些什么活动呢？ [约翰]: 嗯，我们定期组织的一项活动是舞蹈。那是认识大家的好方法。 [朱莉]: 你是指像迪斯科吗？
content.en_text: [Julie]: Okay. So what sorts of things do you do? [John]: Well, one thing we organize on a regular basis is dancing. That's a great way to get to know people. [Julie]: Do you mean like disco?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 不，我们不做迪斯科。我们跳民族舞。有些来自欧洲，但也有一些来自更远的地方。每个人都非常喜欢。我们周一晚上8点半见面。你知道大学中心吗？ [朱莉]: 是的，我想我知道。
content.en_text: [John]: No, we don't do disco. We do folk dances. Some from Europe, but some from further afield. Everyone really enjoys them. We meet on Monday evenings at 830. Do you know the university center? [Julie]: Yes, I think so.

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 我们在那里，在主厅见面。不要和旧厅搞混了，那里有一个交谊舞团。他们和我们无关。
content.en_text: [John]: We meet there in the main hall. Don't get confused with the old hall, where there's a ballroom dancing group. They're nothing to do with us.

content.cn_text: [朱莉]: 我能直接去吗？ [约翰]: 当然，欢迎所有人。 [朱莉]: 跳舞需要带舞伴吗？
content.en_text: [Julie]: And can I just show up? [John]: Sure, everyone's welcome. [Julie]: And do I need to come along with a partner for the dancing?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 你不用，不过如果你想带也可以。我确信你会玩得很开心。我们有些场次有现场音乐。你不会演奏乐器吧？
content.en_text: [John]: You don't have to, though, you can if you want to. I'm sure you'll have a good time. We have live music for some sessions. I don't suppose you play a musical instrument, do you?

content.cn_text: [朱莉]: 我会拉小提琴，但拉得不太好。 [约翰]: 嗯，我们正在寻找一些人加入乐队。如果你感兴趣，为什么不给迈克打电话呢？他的电话是01356890674。
content.en_text: [Julie]: I play the violin, but I'm not very good. [John]: Well, we're looking for some people to join the band. If you're interested, why don't you call Mike? His numbers 01356890674.

content.cn_text: [朱莉]: 好的，谢谢。
content.en_text: [Julie]: Okay, thanks.

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 然后我们还会定期一起聚餐。每月一次，总是在周日，是每月的第二个周日。
content.en_text: [John]: Then we also have a meal together regularly. That's once a month, and it's always on a Sunday, the second one of the month.

content.cn_text: [朱莉]: 哦，那会是这个即将到来的周日了。那在哪里举行呢？
content.en_text: [Julie]: Oh, so that'll be this coming Sunday. And where's that held?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 还是在大学中心食堂，我们以前在底楼的餐厅举行，但不幸的是，现在周末那里关门了，所以我们搬到顶楼了。
content.en_text: [John]: In the university center again in the canteen, we used to have it in the restaurant on the ground floor, but that's closed at weekends now, unfortunately, so we're up on the top floor.

content.cn_text: 他们提供的餐点价格非常合理，比如烤土豆和披萨。 [朱莉]: 我能直接去那里吗？ [约翰]: 当然。
content.en_text: They do very reasonably priced meals, things like baked potatoes and pizza. [Julie]: And can I just show up there? [John]: Absolutely.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 在你听对话的其余部分之前，你有时间查看问题7到10。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at question 7 to 10.

content.cn_text: 现在请听并回答问题7到10。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer question 7 to 10.

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 然后我们还有一些特别的夏季活动。7月2日，我们要去一个叫做大汉普顿的地方，大约半小时车程，参加他们每年在那里举行的嘉年华。那总是很棒的一天，尤其是在阳光明媚的日子里。
content.en_text: [John]: Then we have some special summer events, too. On July the second, we're going to a place called Great Hampton about half an hour's drive away to take part in the carnival they hold there every year. It's always a good day out, especially if it's a sunny day.

content.cn_text: [朱莉]: 哦，露易丝说她去年参加过。她说那真的很好，而且能去城外的地方很不错。
content.en_text: [Julie]: Oh, Louise said she went on that last year. She said it was really good, and it would be nice to go somewhere out of town.

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 好的，那样的话，你可能会对我们7月16日的活动感兴趣。那是在斯坦纳德山的一次徒步。我们大约走15公里，所以这是一次不错的徒步，而且是为了慈善。
content.en_text: [John]: Well, in that case, you might be interested in our event on July the 16th. That's a walk in the standard hills. We do about 15 kilometres, so it's a decent walk and it's for charity.

content.cn_text: [朱莉]: 听起来路程挺远的。
content.en_text: [Julie]: Sounds a pretty long way.

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 然后在8月7日，我们将在我们一位组织者家里举行花园派对。她有一个室外游泳池，所以如果天气足够暖和，你就可以去游泳。
content.en_text: [John]: Then on August the 7th, we're having a garden party at the home of one of our organisers. She has an outdoor pool, so if the weather's warm enough, you'll be able to go swimming.

content.cn_text: [朱莉]: 好的，今天很难想象。
content.en_text: [Julie]: Okay, hard to imagine that today.

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 嗯，夏天还没真正开始呢。我们夏季的最后一个活动是在9月4日。
content.en_text: [John]: Well, the summer hasn't really started yet. Then our last summer events on September the 4th.

content.cn_text: 去年我们去了一座城堡，但今年我们要去剧院。我们确实要求会员提前告知我们，以便我们预订。
content.en_text: Last year, we went to a castle, but this year we're going to the theatre. We do ask members to let us know in advance for that so we can book.

content.cn_text: [朱莉]: 嗯，我肯定想加入。
content.en_text: [Julie]: Well, I definitely like to join.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 你
content.en_text: [Narrator]: You

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

content.en_text: You

content.en_text: You

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You
